overview: EduCareersPath is India's AI-powered career, skill, and human development ecosystem — a premium marketing platform with psychometric assessments, a career library, study-abroad guidance, coding and robotics curricula, and solutions for schools, colleges, corporates, and government."
features: Full ecosystem home page with 19 sections covering all offerings
Career Library with searchable listings and detailed career pages seeded with sample careers
3 timed psychometric assessments with save and resume
Stripe checkout for the Career Passport with coupon support
Student Dashboard with Generate Report button
Admin panel for users, reports, coupons, and payments
Proof of Implementation gallery with 17 real workshop photos
Portal redirects for student dashboard, career library, and sign-in
Unified Resources hub, dashboard overview pages, and expanded navigation
